description: Canonical resonance type registry + the reusable value/profile defs that entities (nodes, tass, avatars) embed to declare their resonance characterization.

main.description:
A canonical resonance type declaration. Each record defines one named axis that entities can be characterized along. Tagged with a 'system' so multiple game cosmologies coexist:
  - mage: Dynamic (Wyld), Static (Weaver), Primordial (Wyrm) — the Triat
  - reverie: entropy, liberty, skeptic, receptive, authority, oblivion
  - custom: anything else
Entities reference these by at-uri in #resonanceValue.axis, OR they use freeform axis names.

system.description: Game system this canonical belongs to ('mage', 'reverie', 'custom', ...)

cosmology.description: Optional cosmological referent (e.g. 'Wyld', 'Weaver', 'Wyrm' for Mage Triat)

opposedTo.description: Name or at-uri of the canonical opposite pole (e.g. Dynamic ↔ Static)

resonanceValue.description: A single (axis, value) pair characterizing an entity along one resonance. 'axis' is either an at-uri pointing to a canonical resonance record in this collection, OR a freeform string name (when the entity is characterized ad-hoc without referencing a published record). 'value' is the entity's position on this axis, stored as a fixed-point integer in range [-1000, 1000] representing the float [-1.0, 1.0] (i.e. actual_value = stored / 1000). Atproto lexicons have no native float type; this is the canonical workaround.

axis.description: AT-URI of a canonical resonance record, OR freeform axis name

value.description: Position on this axis, fixed-point: actual_value = stored / 1000 (so 500 = 0.5, -250 = -0.25)

resonanceProfile.description: An entity's resonance characterization. EITHER 'ref' (at-uri pointing to a published named profile) OR 'values' (inline axis/value pairs). Both unset = no resonance specified. Both set = inline values augment the referenced profile (uncommon).

ref.description: AT-URI of a published named resonance profile

values.description: Inline axis/value pairs (freeform, no named record)
